info.title: Artifacts API
info.description:
Artifacts is an API-based MMO game where you can manage 5 characters to explore, fight, gather resources, craft items and much more.

Website: https://artifactsmmo.com/

Documentation: https://docs.artifactsmmo.com/

OpenAPI Spec: https://api.artifactsmmo.com/openapi.json

get.description: Return the status of the game server.
Fetch bank details.
Fetch all items in your bank.

parameters.name: item_code

schema.title: Item code
schema.description: Item to search in your bank.

parameters.description: Item to search in your bank.

get.description: Fetch your orders details (sell and buy orders).

parameters.name: type

schema.title: Order type
schema.description: Filter by order type (sell or buy).

parameters.description: Filter by order type (sell or buy).

get.description: Fetch your transaction history of the last 7 days (buy and sell orders).

parameters.name: id

schema.title: Order ID
schema.description: Order ID to search in your history.

parameters.description: Order ID to search in your history.

parameters.name: code

schema.title: Item code
schema.description: Item to search in your history.

parameters.description: Item to search in your history.

get.description: Fetch account details.

Retrieve all unclaimed pending items for your account.

These are items from various sources (achievements, grand exchange, events, etc.)
that can be claimed by any character on your account using /my/{name}/action/claim/{id}.
Get all rate limits.

get.description: Get current subscription details.

post.description:
Subscribe to become a member and unlock the benefits tied to your selected plan.
You will receive a secure Stripe checkout URL to complete the payment.

post.description:
Redeem a member token to start or extend membership by 30 days.
Member tokens are manually granted as rewards for events.
Member tokens cannot be redeemed while a Stripe subscription is active.

error.message: An active Stripe subscription cannot be extended with gems or member tokens.

post.description:
Cancel an order (sell or buy) at the Grand Exchange on the character's map.

For sell orders: Items are returned to your inventory.
For buy orders: Gold is refunded to your character.

post.description:
Create a buy order at the Grand Exchange on the character's map.

The total gold (price * quantity) is locked when creating the order.
Other players can then sell items to fulfill your order.
Items will be delivered to your pending items when the order is filled.

get.description:
Retrieve gameplay statistics for a character.

Stats are only visible if the character's account has an active subscription.
Statistics are still collected for all accounts regardless of subscription status.
Fetch active characters details.

post.description:

Member or founder account required.

post.description:
Ask the game assistant a question about game mechanics or public API usage.
An active membership is required. Members receive a limited number of free
questions per day. When no free question is available, the request can spend
1 gem with pay_with_gems=true.
